untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-specific metrics (implied volatility, vega, volatility forecast, spread type selection, time vs. diagonal spreads, dividend/interest rate tracking) that are not available in the provided indicators list. The core logic depends on options Greeks (vega) and volatility regime comparison which cannot be expressed using equity price/technical indicators only. A proxy approximation using hvol_20 vs india_vix was attempted but does not capture the true intent of the signal.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally an options strategy rule requiring Greeks and volatility surface analysis. The allowed indicators are equity technical indicators only. To properly implement NATENBERG_DRY_87_0, you would need: implied_volatility, forecast_volatility, vega, spread_type, rate_sensitivity, dividend_sensitivity. Without these, the rule cannot be accurately translated.
